overview: RAP Integrated Studio Management — a luxury cinematic platform for photography, videography, and short film studio services with full admin control, multi-service booking, Razorpay payments, and a complete content management system.
features: Admin CMS with live text/color/image editing
Multi-service booking with dynamic total calculation
Razorpay payment gateway with real HMAC verification
Full admin control over services, courses, gallery, and payments
Role-based access for Client, Student, Staff, Receptionist, and Admin
